# Old Docker Error

Docker failed with a volume mount error on macOS.
Error message: "Mounts denied: The path /var/lib/docker is not shared".
Fix: add the path to Docker Desktop shared paths in preferences.
Occurred during initial project setup in October 2025.
This is an old unreferenced error note from 2025.
Not linked from any other vault note.
